theme: diagnostic probes that catch every engineered variant
title: Worst-Class Probe Panel
strategies: single-shift forward tiling: one probe per stressed locus at the canonical window start (fails segment-inversion entirely, and fails SNP-cluster edits whose fixed offsets fall in that window)
two-end forward hedging: probes at both ends of the locus window, still forward-only (still blind to inversion; the published SNP damage bands are built to hit both fixed ends)

per-locus dodge search plus dual orientation: read the published SNP-cluster offsets and the published mutant panel, scan every shift to find the damage-free sub-window for the forward probe, and add a reverse-complement probe at every stressed locus so segment-inversion is matched exactly
